## beehiiv webhooks test

Send a test request to a webhook

### Synopsis

Test webhook

Send test info to an already set up webhook endpoint.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/webhooks/{endpointId}/tests

```
beehiiv webhooks test <endpointId> [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv webhooks test endpoint_123
beehiiv hooks ping endpoint_123
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                help for test
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```
